text: The department shall have authority to terminate or to modify the terms or conditions of any order of probation whenever good cause appears therefor.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 3. Investigation and Hearing [13800 - 14401]
#### Article 4. Probation [14250 - 14253]
##### § 14251

The department shall have authority to terminate or to modify the terms or conditions of any order of probation whenever good cause appears therefor.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The department shall have authority to terminate or to modify the terms or conditions of any order of probation whenever good cause appears therefor.
